swahili.no_matches_try_a_different_keyword: Hakuna kinacholingana. Jaribu neno lingine muhimu.
swahili.lavoisier_1789_conservation_of_mass_tr: Lavoisier 1789: uhifadhi wa wingi. Ujanja ni kigawe (SI namba ndogo). 2H₂ + O₂ → 2H₂O. Linganisha metali kwanza, kisha zisizo metali, kisha hidrojeni na oksijeni mwisho.
swahili.synthesis_a_b_ab_decomposition_ab_a_b_: Muunganisho (A+B→AB), mtengano (AB→A+B), ubadilishaji mmoja (A+BC→AC+B), ubadilishaji maradufu (AB+CD→AD+CB), mwako (CxHy + O₂ → CO₂ + H₂O). 95% ya milinganyo ya shuleni huingia katika mmojawapo.
swahili.1_mole_6_022_10_particles_avogadro_mol: Moli 1 = chembe 6.022×10²³ (Avogadro). Wingi wa molari = jumla ya wingi wa atomi. Gramu → moli → moli → gramu. Daraja kati ya milinganyo iliyolinganishwa na wingi wa maabara.
swahili.vsepr_predicts_shape_linear_trigonal_p: VSEPR hutabiri umbo: mstari, pembetatu tambarare, tetrahedroni, piramidi ya pembetatu, iliyopinda. Jozi peke yake huchukua nafasi zaidi kuliko jozi za kifungo. CH₄ ni tetrahedroni kamili; NH₃ imebanwa kidogo.
swahili.lab_safety_ghs_symbols_emergency_respo: Usalama wa maabara — alama za GHS + mwitikio wa dharura
swahili.9_ghs_pictograms_explosive_flammable_o: Piktogramu 9 za GHS: linalolipuka, linalowaka, oksidishaji, gesi yenye shinikizo, babuzi, sumu, kiwasho, hatari ya mazingira, hatari ya afya. Asidi ndani ya maji (kamwe kinyume) — mnyunyizo ni mkali.
swahili.challenge_graded_quiz_across_3_tiers: Changamoto — jaribio lenye alama katika viwango 3
swahili.beginner_naming_counting_atoms_interme: Mwanzo = kutaja + kuhesabu atomi; Wastani = kulinganisha; Juu = hesabu za moli + kiitikio kikomo. Mada za AP Chem 1–6. NGSS HS-PS1.
swahili.element_battle_retrieval_as_combat: Vita vya Elementi — uokoaji kama vita
swahili.speed_builds_automaticity_once_balanci: Kasi hujenga uotomatiki. Wakati kulinganisha + kutaja kunapokuwa otomatiki, kumbukumbu ya kazi hukombolewa kwa hoja za kiwango cha juu, kama kutabiri uundaji wa bidhaa na mabadiliko ya usawa.
swahili.learn_concepts_by_grade_band: Jifunze — dhana kulingana na kiwango cha darasa
swahili.k_2_matter_is_stuff_3_5_matter_cycles_: K-2: maada ni kitu. 3-5: maada huzunguka. MS: atomi + misombo rahisi. HS: hoja kamili kwa jedwali la vipindi. AP: thermodinamiki + kinetiki + usawa. Upatanishi wima hupita kila darasa.
swahili.autobalance_hint: Andika viitikio na bidhaa zako mwenyewe. Hutatuliwa kwa usahihi na hesabu ya uhifadhi wa atomi — mkufunzi wa AI si mamlaka juu ya vigawe kamwe.
swahili.balance_one_element_at_a_time_start_wi: • Linganisha elementi moja kwa wakati • Anza na mchanganyiko changamano zaidi • Acha O au H kwa mwisho
swahili.yield_hint: Ingiza mmenyuko, kisha eleza una gramu ngapi za kila kiitikio.
swahili.protect_your_eyes_from_splashes_fumes_: Linda macho yako dhidi ya mnyunyizo, moshi na vipande. Vaa miwani ya kinga kabla ya kuanza na usiivue hadi usafi ukamilike.
swahili.nitrile_gloves_protect_against_most_la: Glavu za nitrili hulinda dhidi ya kemikali nyingi za maabara. Zibadilishe mara moja zikiraruka au kuchafuliwa.
swahili.use_the_wafting_technique_hold_the_con: Tumia mbinu ya kupepea: shika chombo mbali na uelekeze hewa taratibu kuelekea puani kwa mkono.
swahili.chemical_contamination_is_invisible_ev: Uchafuzi wa kemikali hauonekani. Hata mabaki kwenye mikono au nyuso yanaweza kumezwa.
swahili.wash_thoroughly_with_soap_and_water_fo: Osha vizuri kwa sabuni na maji kwa angalau sekunde 20, hata kama ulivaa glavu.
swahili.before_starting_any_lab_locate_the_nea: Kabla ya kuanza maabara yoyote, tafuta kizima-moto cha karibu, kituo cha kuosha macho, bafu ya dharura na njia za kutoka.
swahili.no_matter_how_small_your_teacher_needs: Bila kujali ni ndogo kiasi gani. Mwalimu wako anahitaji kujua ili achukue hatua sahihi za usafi na usalama.
swahili.test_your_chemistry_knowledge_across_3: Jaribu maarifa yako ya kemia katika viwango 3 vya ugumu!
swahili.a_rogue_element_is_destabilizing_the_c: Elementi asi inavuruga uthabiti wa mchanganyiko! Jibu maswali ya kemia ili kurejesha uthabiti!
swahili.answer_correctly_to_deal_damage_wrong_: Jibu kwa usahihi ili kusababisha uharibifu. Majibu yasiyo sahihi huvuruga uthabiti wa mchanganyiko wako!
swahili.20_chemistry_careers_spanning_research: Zaidi ya taaluma 20 za kemia zinazojumuisha utafiti, viwanda, elimu na udhibiti.
swahili.15_ready_to_use_classroom_labs_for_k_1: Maabara 15 za darasani zilizo tayari kutumika kwa K-12.
swahili.common_chemistry_misconceptions_debunk: Dhana potofu za kawaida za kemia zimekanushwa.
swahili.chemistry_is_the_science_of_substances: Kemia ni sayansi ya vitu + mabadiliko yao.
swahili.every_atom_in_your_body_was_forged_in_: Kila atomi katika mwili wako ilifuliwa katika nyota.
swahili.every_reaction_you_observe_was_already: Kila mmenyuko unaouona ulikuwa tayari ukitokea miaka bilioni 4 iliyopita.
swahili.now_you_have_the_tools_to_understand_t: Sasa una zana za kuelewa ulimwengu ambao umeundwa kutoka kwao.
swahili.three_sliders_h_exponent_log_scale_buf: Vitelezi vitatu: kipeo cha H⁺ (mizani ya logi), uwezo wa bafa, joto. Suluhisho huonyesha mojawapo ya bendi 5 tofauti za pH. Hakuna alama, hakuna ufunuo — telezesha na uangalie.
swahili.hypothesis_free_text_no_right_answer_h: Dhana (maandishi huru — hakuna jibu sahihi): Bafa inaathiri vipi uhusiano wa H+ → pH?
swahili.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_the_third: Shika vitelezi viwili imara. Telezesha cha tatu. Angalia kinachotokea.
swahili.what_happens_to_pure_water_h_exp_7_as_: Nini hutokea kwa maji safi (kipeo cha H⁺ = -7) joto linapobadilika?
swahili.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_b: Pata mipangilio miwili inayozalisha bendi ile ile. Nini kinachofanana kati yao?
swahili.investigate_why_is_the_ph_scale_logari: Chunguza: kwa nini mizani ya pH ni ya logarithimu?
swahili.i_think_i_understand_explain_in_own_wo: Nadhani nimeelewa — eleza kwa maneno yako mwenyewe
swahili.explain_how_h_concentration_buffering_: Eleza jinsi mkusanyiko wa H⁺, ubafa na joto vinavyoamua pamoja pH.
swahili.design_note_discrete_5_band_ph_marker_: Dokezo la muundo: alama ya pH tofauti ya bendi 5; hakuna lengo la uboreshaji la nambari; hakuna ufunuo — kwa makusudi.
swahili.periodic_table_four_major_blocks: ⚛ Jedwali la vipindi — vitalu vinne vikuu

hausa.no_matches_try_a_different_keyword: Babu daidaito. Gwada wata kalma ta daban.
hausa.balance_atoms_in_atoms_out: Daidaita — atam masu shiga = atam masu fita
hausa.lavoisier_1789_conservation_of_mass_tr: Lavoisier 1789: kiyaye yawa. Dabarar ita ce ma'auni (BA ƙaramin lamba ba). 2H₂ + O₂ → 2H₂O. Daidaita ƙarafa da farko, sannan waɗanda ba ƙarfe ba, sannan hydrogen da oxygen a ƙarshe.
hausa.synthesis_a_b_ab_decomposition_ab_a_b_: Haɗuwa (A+B→AB), rarrabuwa (AB→A+B), maye guda (A+BC→AC+B), maye biyu (AB+CD→AD+CB), ƙonawa (CxHy + O₂ → CO₂ + H₂O). Kashi 95% na ma'auni na makaranta na cikin ɗayansu.
hausa.1_mole_6_022_10_particles_avogadro_mol: Mole 1 = ƙwayoyi 6.022×10²³ (Avogadro). Yawan molar = jimlar yawan atam. Gram → mole → mole → gram. Gada tsakanin ma'auni da aka daidaita da adadin dakin gwaje-gwaje.
hausa.vsepr_predicts_shape_linear_trigonal_p: VSEPR yana hasashen siffa: madaidaici, alwatika mai faɗi, tetrahedral, dala ta alwatika, lanƙwasa. Nau'i-nau'i keɓaɓɓu suna ɗaukar sarari fiye da nau'i-nau'i masu haɗi. CH₄ cikakken tetrahedron ne; NH₃ an matse shi kaɗan.
hausa.lab_safety_ghs_symbols_emergency_respo: Tsaron dakin gwaje-gwaje — alamomin GHS + amsawar gaggawa
hausa.9_ghs_pictograms_explosive_flammable_o: Alamomin hoto 9 na GHS: mai fashewa, mai kunna wuta, mai iskar shaka, iskar gas mai matsi, mai lalata, mai guba, mai haushi, haɗarin muhalli, haɗarin lafiya. Acid cikin ruwa (kada a taɓa yin akasi) — tuɓarɓarewa mai ƙarfi.
hausa.challenge_graded_quiz_across_3_tiers: Ƙalubale — jarrabawa mai maki a matakai 3
hausa.beginner_naming_counting_atoms_interme: Mafari = suna + ƙidaya atam; Matsakaici = daidaitawa; Babba = lissafin mole + iyakance reactant. Batutuwan AP Chem 1–6. NGSS HS-PS1.
hausa.element_battle_retrieval_as_combat: Yaƙin Element — dawowa a matsayin yaƙi
hausa.speed_builds_automaticity_once_balanci: Sauri yana gina sarrafa kai. Lokacin da daidaitawa + suna suka zama na atomatik, ƙwaƙwalwar aiki ta samu 'yanci don tunani mafi girma, kamar hasashen samuwar samfura da canjin daidaito.
hausa.k_2_matter_is_stuff_3_5_matter_cycles_: K-2: kwayar halitta abu ce. 3-5: kwayar halitta tana zagayawa. MS: atam + mahaɗai masu sauƙi. HS: cikakken tunani da teburin lokaci. AP: thermodynamics + kinetics + daidaito. Daidaitawa ta tsaye tana bi ta kowane aji.
hausa.switch_preset: Canza saitin da aka riga aka shirya
hausa.autobalance_hint: Rubuta reactants da samfuranka. Ana warware shi daidai da lissafin kiyaye atam — malamin AI ba shi da iko a kan ma'auni kwata-kwata.
hausa.already_balanced_note: Ka rubuta shi ya riga ya daidaita — yayi kyau.
hausa.balance_one_element_at_a_time_start_wi: • Daidaita element ɗaya a lokaci • Fara da mahaɗi mafi rikitarwa • Bar O ko H don ƙarshe
hausa.enter_a_valid_formula_above: Shigar da tsari ingantacce a sama
hausa.enter_a_valid_formula_above_2: Shigar da tsari ingantacce a sama
hausa.grams_to_convert_to_moles: Gram da za a canza zuwa mole
hausa.moles_to_convert_to_grams: Mole da za a canza zuwa gram
hausa.yield_hint: Shigar da sinadari, sannan ka faɗi gram nawa na kowane reactant kake da shi.
hausa.reaction_for_yield: Sinadari don na'urar lissafin yawan amfani
hausa.protect_your_eyes_from_splashes_fumes_: Kare idanunka daga tuɓarɓarewa, hayaƙi da guntu. Sa tabarau na kariya kafin fara aiki kuma kada ka cire su har sai an gama tsaftacewa.
hausa.nitrile_gloves_protect_against_most_la: Safar hannu na nitrile suna kare daga yawancin sinadaran dakin gwaje-gwaje. Canza su nan take idan sun yage ko sun gurɓace.
hausa.use_the_wafting_technique_hold_the_con: Yi amfani da dabarar fifita: riƙe kwanon a nesa kuma ka bi da iska a hankali zuwa hancinka da hannunka.
hausa.chemical_contamination_is_invisible_ev: Gurɓatar sinadarai ba a gani. Ko alamun da ke kan hannuwa ko saman ana iya haɗiye su.
hausa.wash_thoroughly_with_soap_and_water_fo: Wanke sosai da sabulu da ruwa aƙalla dakika 20, ko da ka sa safar hannu.
hausa.before_starting_any_lab_locate_the_nea: Kafin fara kowane dakin gwaje-gwaje, gano na'urar kashe wuta mafi kusa, tashar wanke ido, shawa na gaggawa da hanyoyin fita.
hausa.no_matter_how_small_your_teacher_needs: Ko da ƙanƙanta yake. Malaminka na buƙatar sani domin ya ɗauki matakan tsaftacewa da tsaro masu dacewa.
hausa.test_your_chemistry_knowledge_across_3: Gwada ilimin kemistrinka a matakai 3 na wahala!
hausa.a_rogue_element_is_destabilizing_the_c: Wani element ɗan tawaye yana ruguza kwanciyar hankalin mahaɗi! Amsa tambayoyin kemistri don dawo da kwanciyar hankali!
hausa.answer_correctly_to_deal_damage_wrong_: Amsa daidai don yin lahani. Amsoshi marasa daidai suna ruguza kwanciyar hankalin mahaɗinka!
hausa.20_standard_amino_acids: Acid amino 20 na yau da kullun
hausa.20_chemistry_careers_spanning_research: Fiye da sana'o'i 20 na kemistri da suka haɗa da bincike, masana'antu, ilimi da tsari.
hausa.15_ready_to_use_classroom_labs_for_k_1: Dakunan gwaje-gwaje 15 na aji shirye don amfani ga K-12.
hausa.common_chemistry_misconceptions_debunk: An karyata fahimtar kuskure na kemistri na kowa.
hausa.36_sub_tools_118_elements_hundreds_of_: Ƙananan kayan aiki 36 · element 118 · Gaskiya ɗaruruwa
hausa.what_you_now_have_access_to: 📚 Abin da za ka iya samu yanzu
hausa.every_atom_in_your_body_was_forged_in_: Kowace atam a jikinka an ƙera ta a cikin tauraro.
hausa.every_reaction_you_observe_was_already: Kowane sinadari da ka lura da shi ya riga ya faru shekaru biliyan 4 da suka wuce.
hausa.now_you_have_the_tools_to_understand_t: Yanzu kana da kayan aiki don fahimtar duniyar da aka ƙera ka daga cikinta.
hausa.three_sliders_h_exponent_log_scale_buf: Zaɓaɓɓu uku: ma'aunin H⁺ (ma'aunin log), ƙarfin bafa, zafi. Maganin yana nuna ɗaya daga cikin makada 5 na pH daban-daban. Babu maki, babu bayyanawa — zura kuma ka lura.
hausa.hypothesis_free_text_no_right_answer_h: Hasashe (rubutu na kyauta — babu amsa daidai): Yaya bafa ke shafar alaƙar H+ → pH?
hausa.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Ka makale — nuna tambayoyi a buɗe
hausa.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_the_third: Riƙe zaɓaɓɓu biyu tsayayye. Zura na uku. Lura da abin da ke faruwa.
hausa.what_happens_to_pure_water_h_exp_7_as_: Me ke faruwa ga ruwa mai tsafta (ma'aunin H⁺ = -7) yayin da zafi ke canzawa?
hausa.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_b: Nemo saituna biyu da ke samar da makada iri ɗaya. Me ya zama gama gari a tsakaninsu?
hausa.investigate_why_is_the_ph_scale_logari: Bincika: me ya sa ma'aunin pH yana logarithmic?
hausa.i_think_i_understand_explain_in_own_wo: Ina tsammani na fahimta — bayyana da kalmominka
hausa.explain_how_h_concentration_buffering_: Bayyana yadda mayar da hankali na H⁺, bafa da zafi ke tantance pH tare.
hausa.design_note_discrete_5_band_ph_marker_: Bayanin ƙira: alamar pH ta daban ta makada 5; babu manufar ingantawa ta lamba; babu bayyanawa — da gangan.
